$comment: v0.10-P2-A · Phase A of the DESIGN-SYSTEM-ROADMAP.md uplift.
Single source of truth for every brand / surface / typography
decision made anywhere in PixCull's three rendering targets:
Editable by designers via Tokens Studio (a Figma plugin) — the
JSON shape mirrors their schema.  Engineers consume the output
file into the three platform-specific targets at build time.
DO NOT edit the generated *.css / *.swift files — edits will be
overwritten on the next build.  Edit THIS file.

indigo.description: Brand gradient stop 1 (Option A · current) — v2.3 editorial-warm (Option C, ACTIVE): brass/graphite, replacing the purple Option-A. Key name kept as gradient-stop slot. See docs/ROADMAP-v2.3-ui-charter.md.

gradient.description: The signature gradient. Avoid using this anywhere except v0.9-defined signature surfaces (logo, primary CTA, hero numerals, loading bar).

indigo-b.description: Phase B candidate · Option B — cooler iris. NOT yet in CSS output; see BRAND-GUIDE.md §3.4. Phase B designer chooses A/B/C.

violet-b.description: Phase B candidate · Option B — royal-violet

pink-b.description: Phase B candidate · Option B — peony pink

gradient-b.description: Phase B candidate gradient (Option B) — slightly more distinctive vs Linear/Stripe. Phase B designer's call.

bg.description: App background — warm espresso ground (v2.3 editorial-warm)

surface-3.description: Inset blocks (e.g. inspector cell, code blocks)

decision.$comment: Aliases to semantic.* — keep + maybe + cull badges all over the UI key on these names

display.value: Geist Variable, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI Variable, Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft Yahei UI, sans-serif

body.value: Geist Variable, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI Variable, Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft Yahei UI, sans-serif

mono.value: ui-monospace, SF Mono, JetBrains Mono, Menlo, monospace

serif.value: Charter, Iowan Old Style, PT Serif, Source Serif Pro, Source Serif 4, Cambria, Georgia, Songti SC, STZhongsong, serif
serif.description: v0.9-P0-3 serif accent — used for hero numerals, executive PDF cover, brand wordmark

size.$description: v0.13.15 — codified type scale (T-shirt scale + legacy aliases). 10 steps from 10.5px → 56px. Use --font-size-<step> in CSS;  legacy hero/h2/h3/body/small/tiny are alias-pointers and stay for backward compat.

xs.description: metadata, axis chip values, tooltip captions

sm.description: secondary UI text · sidebar group labels · breadcrumb

base.description: form labels · button text · chip body · stats

md.description: body copy default · card filename · descriptions

lg.description: card title · panel headings · section labels

xl.description: modal subhead · admin table head · CTA primary

2xl.description: page section h2 · empty-state title · workspace nav

3xl.description: modal title · page intro · admin h1

4xl.description: hero numerals · share portfolio key stat

5xl.description: share page main hero · empty-state hero numerals

6xl.description: marketing-style display · executive PDF cover h0

size.$comment: --- Legacy aliases (deprecated; keep until v0.14 migration) ---

out.description: PixCull-Overshoot — the signature curve. 6% overshoot at y≈1.04, settles at 1.00. Same family as Linear/Stripe/Apple Photos. Used on 200+ transitions; the brand's motion identity.

pixcull-overshoot.description: Canonical name for the signature curve. Use this name in any new CSS over ease.out for clarity.

out-flat.description: PixCull-Overshoot-Flat — use ONLY where overshoot would mislead the user (data-bar widths, progress fills).

in-out.description: Linear-symmetric ease. Modal entrance + exit when both sides need to mirror.

spring.description: Alias of ease.out / pixcull-overshoot — kept for legacy CSS references.

_themes.$comment: Future home of theme-light overrides (v0.9-P2-1 sand/cream palette). Phase A only ships the dark theme as the source of truth; light theme migration to this file is Phase A.1.
